item.title: This Feels Nice on the Farm
item.description: A satisfying farm moment highlights smooth operations, good conditions, and the enjoyment of hands-on agricultural work.

media:content.media:title: This Feels Nice on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A satisfying farm moment highlights smooth operations, good conditions, and the enjoyment of hands-on agricultural work.

item.title: First Safety Upgrade on the Farm
item.description: A first farm safety upgrade is installed, showing equipment improvements, practical changes, and steps taken to enhance operator safety.

media:content.media:title: First Safety Upgrade on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A first farm safety upgrade is installed, showing equipment improvements, practical changes, and steps taken to enhance operator safety.

item.title: Hauling 70,000 Pounds of Grain
item.description: A heavy grain haul showcases large-scale farm logistics, loading operations, and the effort required to move 70,000 pounds efficiently.

media:content.media:title: Hauling 70,000 Pounds of Grain
media:content.media:description: A heavy grain haul showcases large-scale farm logistics, loading operations, and the effort required to move 70,000 pounds efficiently.

item.title: Immaculate Farm Views
item.description: A scenic look at farm landscapes highlights wide-open fields, peaceful surroundings, and the beauty of agricultural life outdoors.

media:content.media:title: Immaculate Farm Views
media:content.media:description: A scenic look at farm landscapes highlights wide-open fields, peaceful surroundings, and the beauty of agricultural life outdoors.

item.title: A Girl and Her Big Rig
item.description: A powerful big rig is driven and managed with confidence, showing trucking skills, road work, and life behind the wheel of heavy equipment.

media:content.media:title: A Girl and Her Big Rig
media:content.media:description: A powerful big rig is driven and managed with confidence, showing trucking skills, road work, and life behind the wheel of heavy equipment.

item.title: The Real Price of Farming
item.description: A look at the true cost of farming, covering expenses, risks, equipment, and the financial realities behind running a modern agricultural operation.

media:content.media:title: The Real Price of Farming
media:content.media:description: A look at the true cost of farming, covering expenses, risks, equipment, and the financial realities behind running a modern agricultural operation.

item.title: What’s Next, Boss? On the Farm
item.description: A look at planning the next steps on the farm, showing decision-making, upcoming work, and the day-to-day strategy behind agricultural operations.

media:content.media:title: What’s Next, Boss? On the Farm
media:content.media:description: A look at planning the next steps on the farm, showing decision-making, upcoming work, and the day-to-day strategy behind agricultural operations.

item.title: Tractor Unboxing Choice
item.description: A new tractor unboxing and selection process, showing options, features, and the decision-making behind choosing the right farm equipment.

media:content.media:title: Tractor Unboxing Choice
media:content.media:description: A new tractor unboxing and selection process, showing options, features, and the decision-making behind choosing the right farm equipment.

item.title: Digging a 1 Acre Farm Pond
item.description: A large-scale excavation project creates a 1-acre farm pond, showing heavy equipment work, land shaping, and water management improvements.

media:content.media:title: Digging a 1 Acre Farm Pond
media:content.media:description: A large-scale excavation project creates a 1-acre farm pond, showing heavy equipment work, land shaping, and water management improvements.

item.title: Laura Farms I Got This Moment
item.description: A confident moment on the farm shows hands-on work, decision-making, and tackling daily challenges with determination and skill.

media:content.media:title: Laura Farms I Got This Moment
media:content.media:description: A confident moment on the farm shows hands-on work, decision-making, and tackling daily challenges with determination and skill.

item.title: Restoring a Worn Farm Gearbox
item.description: A worn gearbox is disassembled and restored, showing inspection, repair steps, and mechanical rebuilding to bring equipment back to working condition.

media:content.media:title: Restoring a Worn Farm Gearbox
media:content.media:description: A worn gearbox is disassembled and restored, showing inspection, repair steps, and mechanical rebuilding to bring equipment back to working condition.

item.title: Servicing a 16 Row Planter
item.description: A 16-row John Deere planter is serviced, showing maintenance steps, inspections, and adjustments to keep planting equipment running efficiently.

media:content.media:title: Servicing a 16 Row Planter
media:content.media:description: A 16-row John Deere planter is serviced, showing maintenance steps, inspections, and adjustments to keep planting equipment running efficiently.
